claimText: The Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) launched the Integrity Matters Checklist to align corporate climate disclosures with UN net-zero standards.
evidenceExcerpt: GRI launched the Integrity Matters Checklist to align corporate climate disclosures with UN net-zero standards.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent climate frameworks and their launching bodies.
distractorHooks: Launched by UNEP or WEF instead of GRI
Aimed at government disclosures instead of corporate

claimText: The Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) is a non-profit body established in 1997 that sets sustainability reporting frameworks.
evidenceExcerpt: GRI was established in 1997 as a non-profit body setting sustainability reporting frameworks.
examUse: Institution-feature question regarding the nature and founding of GRI.

claimText: The Net-Zero Banking Alliance was established in 2021 under the UN Environment Programme's Finance Initiative (UNEP FI).
evidenceExcerpt: The Net-Zero Banking Alliance was established in 2021 under the UNEP Finance Initiative
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question on climate finance initiatives and their parent bodies.
distractorHooks: Established under the World Bank or IMF

claimText: The Net-Zero Banking Alliance has been dissolved following the withdrawal of several member banks.
evidenceExcerpt: Net-Zero Banking Alliance: It has been dissolved after several member banks withdrew.
examUse: Statement-based question testing current affairs status of climate alliances.
distractorHooks: It is currently expanding its membership
It became a mandatory UN regulatory body

claimText: The primary aim of the Net-Zero Banking Alliance was to encourage banks to reduce the carbon footprint of their loans and investments.
evidenceExcerpt: The Net-Zero Banking Alliance aimed to encourage banks to reduce the carbon footprint of their loans and investments.
examUse: Statement-based question on the objectives of specific climate finance alliances.
distractorHooks: Aimed to fund renewable energy projects directly
Aimed to provide loans to developing nations for climate adaptation
